name: Tether
subtitle: Persistent remote-shell console
description: Real PTY shells on your server, streamed to your phone. Sessions survive disconnects and server restarts.

apps.name: Tether
apps.subtitle: Your shells, on your phone
apps.localizedDescription: Persistent remote-shell console. Multi-session tabs, full VT emulator (TUIs, box drawing, CJK/emoji), key repeat, search, snippets. Shells keep running when you disconnect — and survive server restarts.

versions.localizedDescription:
Desktop client hardening.

**Terminal correctness**
- Application-cursor mode (DECCKM): arrows/Home/End send SS3 vs CSI per the app's mode (fixes vim/less/readline navigation) — desktop keys and mobile key bar
- AltGr (Ctrl+Alt+char) types the composed glyph — EU/intl layouts can enter @ { } [ ] \
- Mouse wheel forwarded to mouse-reporting TUIs (desktop), at the pointer cell, using the app's negotiated encoding (SGR or legacy X10)

**Auto-update**
- In-app self-update via GitHub Releases, minisign-verified; styled modal with a live download progress bar, then relaunch
- Launch auto-check + manual 'Check for updates'; gated to updatable installs (AppImage/macOS/Windows — not deb/rpm)

**Desktop polish**
- Window size/position/maximized persist across launches
- Right-click terminal menu: Copy / Paste / Select all
- Polling pauses while hidden; ws send failures surface as a reconnect

Downloads: Linux .deb/.rpm/.AppImage, Windows .msi/.exe, macOS .dmg (arm64 + x64). macOS + updater artifacts are signed by CI using the repo signing secrets.

Desktop client UI/UX tuned for keyboard-and-mouse:

- **Docked session sidebar** replaces the slide-in drawer on desktop
- **No on-screen key bar** — physical keyboard sends arrows/Tab/Esc/nav/F-keys/Ctrl+Alt combos straight to the shell
- **Native mouse text selection**; Ctrl/Cmd+C copies selection or sends SIGINT, Ctrl/Cmd+V pastes (bracketed)
- Terminal grid now fits the pane beside the sidebar (no column overflow)

Also: fixed the docs site deploy (GitHub Pages) and documented the desktop app.

Downloads: Linux .deb/.rpm/.AppImage, Windows .msi/.exe, macOS .dmg (arm64 + x64).

Adds a **desktop client** built from the same app via Expo Web + Tauri. The WebSocket runs on the Rust side so the shared-password header works (browsers can't set it).

**Desktop downloads** (this release, built by CI):
- **Linux:** `.deb` (Ubuntu/Mint), `.rpm` (Fedora), `.AppImage` (Arch + any distro)
- **Windows:** `.msi` / `.exe`
- **macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon + Intel; unsigned)

Plus the usual server binaries + mobile IPA/APK. Server unchanged.

The server now ships as a **single self-contained binary** — no bun, git, or node_modules on the box.

- **Install:** `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/samuelloranger/tether/main/install.sh | sh` — detects OS/arch, drops the binary in `~/.local/bin/tether`.
- **Update:** `tether update` downloads the latest release binary and restarts (atomic swap). No more git/rsync.
- One binary is the whole CLI: `serve | start | stop | restart | status | logs | set-password | update | version`.
- Data moves to `~/.tether/config/tether.db`; an existing `~/.tether/app` install migrates automatically on first run (password + sessions preserved, live sessions reattached).
- macOS binaries unsigned; x64 built baseline (no AVX2 requirement).

## Fixes

- `apps/server/bun.lock` was a stale duplicate of the workspace root lockfile, out of sync with `package.json` (typescript `^7.0.2` vs locked `^5.8.2`). Removed it — `install.sh` extracts `apps/server` standalone, so bun's frozen-lockfile check was tripping on the drift and hard-failing every fresh install.
- `install.sh` now auto-recovers from lockfile drift: if `bun install --production` fails, it regenerates the lockfile and retries once before giving up.

Patch: removes the unused Face ID (`NSFaceIDUsageDescription`) permission from the iOS build so AltStore installs without prompting for an undeclared permission. SecureStore keychain storage is unchanged (biometrics were never used).

Patch on v1.0.7.

- Honest connection state when switching servers: a first attempt to a new/unreachable server now shows **Connecting…** instead of a false *Reconnecting… (session kept running)*.
- Server test isolation: `bun test` suite pins a temp DB via preload, so tests never touch a developer's live server password.

Redesign fixing the design audit (16/30 → trust/recovery/honesty).

- **Auth**: shared password required on all `/api/*` (HTTP + WebSocket). First install sets the password from the phone (TOFU pairing). No more open shell on the network. Encryption delegated to your tunnel (Tailscale/WireGuard/SSH).
- **Setup**: testable connection flow with clear failure states + direct edit/recovery.
- **Honesty**: transcript-scope copy, no safety overclaims, confirmations before Kill/Restart.
- **A11y/quality**: WCAG-AA action contrast, reduced-motion caret, terminal screen-reader labels, empty state, lighter icon bundle.

Upgrading: set a password on first launch. Run `tether set-password` on the server or pair from the app.

## What's Changed
* feat(mobile): links survive line-break by @samuelloranger in https://github.com/samuelloranger/tether/pull/2
* chore: upgrade to TypeScript 7.0 by @samuelloranger in https://github.com/samuelloranger/tether/pull/4


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/samuelloranger/tether/compare/v1.0.5...v1.0.6

Fix: the **Select Text** (copy) screen no longer scrolls up and down endlessly — it now sits still so you can select and copy.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/samuelloranger/tether/compare/v1.0.4...v1.0.5

Fix: exiting Claude Code with double Ctrl+C no longer leaves stale terminal UI on screen (kitty keyboard protocol CSI misparse). Hardened the terminal emulator against private-prefixed / intermediate-byte CSI sequences; added IND/NEL; and (post-review) stopped replying to private DSR controls (CSI >n) that would inject bogus input into the PTY. See #1.

## What's new
- Tappable URLs in terminal output — tap any http(s) link to open it in the browser.

Initial release.

**Server**
- Persistent PTY sessions in detached holder processes — shells survive server restarts and upgrades
- SQLite replay with prune watermark + client reset frames; no output lost across reboots
- One-line installer (see README)

**Mobile**
- Multi-session tabs, full VT emulator: wide CJK/emoji cells, DEC box drawing, scrollback-preserving resize
- Key repeat, Del key, blinking cursor, output search, snippets
- Reconnect race fixed; scroll pinning that doesn't fight you
